case_title: BMW OF SAN FRANCISCO VS MONTOYA, GINA

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $253.56 FILED BY BMW OF SAN FRANCISCO AS TO DEFENDANT MONTOYA, GINA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-26-1996 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT C
UNTIMELY POS; DEFT GINA MONTOYA WAS GIVEN LESS THAN 20 DAYS NOTICE FOR SUBSTITUTION OF SERVICE IN SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BMW OF SAN FRANCISCO IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT MONTOYA, GINA DEFT'S WAVIED UNTIMELY SERVICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MONTOYA, GINA
